research_mapping.causal_question: Can the frozen order-regime descriptor distinguish two pre-existing historical EOH BP candidates on fresh development-only paired orders, and does it yield an archive-admissible counterexample or ranking flip?
research_mapping.claim_limit: This is an implementation-validation card, not a formal cohort and not an algorithm-quality claim.

why_not_run_now: Project Testing Policy forbids automatic test execution after code changes.
The comparison evaluates candidate code even though it needs no LLM calls.
No approval exists to execute the new development profile.
approval_scope_if_granted: Evaluate exactly the two frozen source codes once each on the declared development profile.
Instantiate the ranking tracker and an in-memory FME archive only; do not persist raw item sequences, candidate code, or large logs.
Write one redacted machine summary and one human result note after execution.
still_forbidden_if_approved: FME v2 manifest, profile, controller, recorder, or cohort changes
candidate replacement, extra candidates, retries, or threshold changes

source_candidates.selection_rule: Select source-file indices 0 and 1 because they are the first two distinct code hashes in frozen file order. Do not inspect or select on any order-regime result.

execution_flow: Verify every frozen input hash and confirm explicit user approval before constructing the profile.
Evaluate each frozen source code once with BPONLINEBroad structured feedback, report_held_out=false, and the isolated order-regime profile.
Compile each OrderFeedbackSummary, then feed both summaries to OrderRegimeRankingTracker.
Use FMEArchives(None) only for an in-memory counterexample-admission precheck; do not create a persistent archive in this validation card.
Record all two coordinates and a compact comparison verdict without raw code, raw items, population, model response, or large logs.

pre_execution_reject: branch or any frozen source, code, contract, module, adapter, or FME v2 manifest hash differs
profile appears in a runnable manifest or CLI surface
run would create LLM calls, held-out access, a third candidate, retry, or FME v2 modification
execution_inconclusive: either frozen candidate raises an evaluation exception, times out, or is infeasible
the returned feedback lacks visible_scope=dev_only or the declared development suite
any pair lacks matching multiset_hash or distinct order_hash
module_reject: the two distinct code hashes yield the same behavior_profile_hash and no distinct ranking signature
no in-memory counterexample is archive-admissible and OrderRegimeRankingTracker returns no ranking flip
the result needs an after-the-fact seed, candidate, metric, or threshold change to appear informative
gates.optional_retention: Both coordinates complete without integrity failures, descriptor_separated is true, and at least one archive-admissible counterexample or ranking flip is present. Retention only permits a later separately frozen proposal; it does not authorize a cohort.

evidence_refs.purpose: frozen adapter contract and exit rule
offline Module implementation and isolation state
